name: Tillster Restaurant Digital Ordering API
what_it_does: Tillster restaurant digital ordering and engagement REST API for quick service and fast casual restaurant chains to manage multi-channel digital ordering, kiosk, loyalty, and customer engagement. Enables AI agents to manage digital menu and upsell configuration for restaurant ordering channel automation, handle kiosk order management and touchless ordering for restaurant self-service automation, access mobile app and web ordering for restaurant digital channel automation, retrieve customer order history and preference data for restaurant personalization automation, manage loyalty points and reward redemption for restaurant customer retention automation, handle coupon and promotional offer distribution for restaurant marketing automation, access order analytics and channel attribution for restaurant digital performance reporting, retrieve personalized upsell recommendation for restaurant revenue optimization automation, manage multi-location digital ordering configuration for restaurant chain management automation, and integrate Tillster with Oracle Simphony, NCR Aloha, and enterprise POS for restaurant chain digital ordering management.
use_cases: Managing kiosk orders from QSR digital ordering automation agents
Running loyalty programs from restaurant customer retention agents
Personalizing upsells from restaurant revenue optimization agents
Reporting digital channel performance from QSR analytics agents
not_for: Independent single-location restaurants (use ChowNow or Square)
Third-party delivery marketplace integration (use ItsaCheckmate or Olo)
Enterprise hotel and casino food service (use Oracle Simphony)
best_when: A quick service or fast casual restaurant chain wanting AI agents to automate multi-channel digital ordering (kiosk, mobile, web), personalized upsell recommendations, loyalty point management, and customer engagement across the brand's own digital channels.
avoid_when: KIOSK PCI-DSS PAYMENT SECURITY FOR UNATTENDED TERMINALS: Automated kiosk ordering via Tillster involves unattended payment terminals requiring PCI-DSS PA-DSS compliance for payment application; automated kiosk software updates must maintain PA-DSS compliant payment application; unattended kiosk with non-compliant payment application creates PCI-DSS violation. PERSONALIZATION ALGORITHM DISPARATE IMPACT FOR PROTECTED CHARACTERISTICS: Automated personalized upsell recommendations via Tillster ML engine must not factor protected characteristics into recommendation logic; automated offers that vary by inferred demographic characteristics create consumer protection and discrimination exposure; implement fairness testing for personalization algorithms. LOYALTY EXPIRATION TERMS DISCLOSURE: Automated loyalty point expiration via Tillster must comply with state unclaimed property laws and loyalty program disclosure requirements; automated point expiration without adequate advance notification creates consumer protection violation in states with gift card and loyalty value protection laws.

auth.notes: Tillster uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes for restaurant and partner integrations. REST API with JSON. Los Angeles, California HQ. Founded 2009 by Perse Faily. Private (~$50M raised). Quick service and fast casual restaurant digital ordering platform. Kiosk, mobile, web, and social ordering. Loyalty and engagement. Oracle Simphony and NCR Aloha POS integration. Clients include Pizza Hut, Jamba Juice, Popeyes. Competes with Olo, Paytronix, and PAX Technology for restaurant digital ordering.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise subscription for restaurant chains
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise subscription per brand; per-location module fees for kiosk, mobile, and loyalty; custom pricing for large QSR chains
pricing.notes: Los Angeles CA. Private. Founded 2009. Enterprise subscription per brand. Per-location module fees. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; order and loyalty queries throttled; webhooks for order and loyalty events

known_agent_gotchas: KIOSK PA-DSS PAYMENT APPLICATION CERTIFICATION: Tillster kiosk ordering payment application must maintain PA-DSS or P2PE certification for unattended payment; automated kiosk application updates must not modify PA-DSS certified payment code paths; any automated code deployment that touches payment handling requires PA-DSS re-certification before production deployment

UPSELL RECOMMENDATION REAL-TIME vs BATCH LATENCY: Tillster personalized upsell recommendations have two modes: real-time ML inference and batch pre-computed recommendations; real-time inference has higher latency but better personalization; automated upsell configuration must select appropriate mode based on kiosk and mobile response time requirements; batch mode may serve stale recommendations for recently changed customer behavior

LOYALTY POINTS DOUBLE-AWARD ON RETRY: Automated loyalty point award on order completion may double-award if order completion event is received twice due to POS webhook retry; implement loyalty award idempotency on order ID to prevent duplicate point awards; double-awarded points create loyalty liability and audit reconciliation issues

MENU DAYPART CONFIGURATION FOR AUTOMATED SCHEDULING: Tillster digital menus support daypart configuration (breakfast, lunch, dinner, late night); automated menu management must correctly configure daypart schedules per location timezone; daypart misconfiguration creates wrong menu served at kiosk during off-daypart periods

COUPON FRAUD DETECTION FOR AUTOMATED DISTRIBUTION: Automated promotional coupon distribution via Tillster must implement single-use enforcement and fraud pattern detection; automated coupon generation without velocity limits and redemption tracking creates coupon stacking and promotional abuse by customers using automated coupon aggregation tools

POS INTEGRATION FAILOVER FOR KIOSK UPTIME: Tillster kiosk ordering depends on POS integration for order injection; automated kiosk operations must implement POS integration health check and fallback to kiosk-stored order queue during POS downtime; POS maintenance without kiosk failover creates complete kiosk ordering outage during maintenance windows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant digital ordering. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Customer order, loyalty, and digital ordering data.

security_score_components.security_notes: QSR digital ordering. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Customer order, loyalty, and kiosk transaction data.
